---
title: "latency_check.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\latency_check.py"
loc: 25
complexity: 4
logic_score: 6.17
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 4.60
overall_score: 3.72
---

## Intent
The `latency_check.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on measure_startup. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via measure_startup. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)

### Exports
- `measure_startup`
